title: goodenia krauseana
intro: Goodenia krauseana, also known as Native Violet, is a perennial plant species native to Australia, belonging to the Goodeniaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Australian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which aid in the treatment of wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Goodenia krauseana often involve making teas, infusions, and tinctures from its leaves, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
